name: MINERVA NEUROSC. DL-,0001
summary: Minerva Neurosciences, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on the development and commercialization of therapies for central nervous system (CNS) diseases. The company's pipeline includes product candidates for schizophrenia, major depressive disorder, and insomnia. Minerva Neurosciences is headquartered in Waltham, Massachusetts.
